svg.aria-label: KV cache memory calculation comparing naive full cache and Gemma 4 hybrid cache estimate.
svg.text: KV cache math: why hybrid attention matters
Approximation for 31B public config, BF16 KV, batch size 1. Real runtimes add their own allocator and paging details.

g.text: If all 60 layers stored full 256K context with local KV size
Hybrid idea: local layers keep a window; global layers keep long-range cache
Full attention scores: 262144^2=68.7B; local window scores: 262144*1024=268M; reduction=256x.
